commit_message:
fix: Resolve Spark cluster startup and YARN timeout issues

TECHNICAL FIXES BASED ON HOSTILE TESTING:
- Fix SDKMAN integration in ensure_spark_available() function
- Add proper SDKMAN initialization and current version detection  
- Fix YARN timeout in yarn_application_list() with 10s timeout
- Improve error handling for missing SPARK_HOME
- Add fallback detection for Spark installations

TESTED FUNCTIONALITY:
✅ Spark module loads successfully with CRITICAL_FUNCTION_GUARD
✅ SDKMAN integration works properly (no more cache errors)
✅ YARN functions timeout gracefully instead of hanging
✅ Spark status detection works correctly
✅ Cluster startup logic improved

These fixes address the core technical issues identified in hostile testing 
while maintaining honest documentation about development vs production capabilities.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
